summary: Sustainability Frameworks Integration Module fully tested. All 32 backend API tests passed (100%). All 4 frontend tabs verified: Dashboard, GRESB, LEED, and Value Impact calculators. All features working correctly with proper results display.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard KPIs correctly show: Certified Properties (5), Certified AUM ($3.5B), Potential Uplift ($15.5M), Avg GRESB Score (76.0)
Certifications table displays 5 sample properties with certification type, level, score, value premium, and impact
GRESB Calculator correctly shows star rating (1-5 stars), benchmark comparison (percentile rank), value impact, and improvement recommendations
LEED Calculator correctly calculates points, certification level (Certified/Silver/Gold/Platinum), value impact, and category performance analysis
Value Impact Calculator shows value/rent premiums with ranges, cap rate compression, operating cost savings, and research sources
All data-testid attributes properly added to tabs and calculate buttons
Tab navigation works correctly between Dashboard, GRESB, LEED, and Value Impact tabs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sustainability Frameworks Module fully implemented and tested. All APIs use SAMPLE/HARDCODED data (not from real DB) - this is intentional per the design. The module has 4 tabs: Dashboard, GRESB, LEED, Value Impact. All calculations are working correctly. Frontend URL: /sustainability accessible from sidebar 'Sustainability' menu item.
passed_tests: Dashboard tab: Shows KPI cards (Certified Properties 5, Certified AUM $3.5B, Potential Uplift $15.5M, Avg GRESB Score 76.0)
Dashboard tab: Shows Certifications by Type chart (LEED 2, BREEAM 1, Energy Star 1, GRESB 1)
Dashboard tab: Shows Certifications by Level badges (gold, very good, certified, 4 star, platinum)
Dashboard tab: Shows Certified Properties table with 5 properties
GRESB tab: All input fields present (Portfolio Name, Region, Total AUM, Number of Assets)
GRESB tab: Component score sliders work (Management, Policy, Risk Management, Stakeholder Engagement, Performance Indicators)
GRESB tab: Calculate button works - shows star rating, benchmark comparison, value impact
GRESB tab: Sample result - 3 STAR, 50/100 points, 20th percentile, $148.8M value impact
LEED tab: All input fields present (Property Name, Property Sector, GFA, Current Value)
LEED tab: Category score sliders work (9 categories)
LEED tab: Calculate button works - shows certification level, points, value impact
LEED tab: Sample result - SILVER, 53/110 points, +10.2% value premium, $10.2M impact
Value Impact tab: All dropdowns work (Certification Type, Level, Sector, Region)
Value Impact tab: All input fields present (Current Value, NOI, GFA, Current Rent)
Value Impact tab: Calculate button works - shows value/rent premiums, financial benefits, sources
Value Impact tab: Sample result - $15.3M value uplift, +15.3% value premium, +9.0% rent premium
Tab navigation: All 4 tabs clickable and switch correctly

mocked_apis_list: Note: Sample data is intentional per design - all calculation engines are real
